step.title: Define hypothesis
step.action: Define the question or hypothesis to investigate. Clarify what a successful answer looks like.
If architecture context exists, load it to ground the investigation.

step.title: Set timebox and scope
step.action: Set timebox (default 2 hours) and scope boundaries.
Define what is in-scope and explicitly out-of-scope to prevent rabbit holes.

step.title: Research approaches
step.action: Research approaches — read docs, explore libraries, check prior art, review community solutions.

step.title: Build minimal prototype
step.action: Build minimal prototype if needed to validate hypothesis. Keep it throwaway — just enough to prove or disprove.

step.title: Document findings
step.action: Document findings with evidence: code snippets, benchmarks, links, and observations.

step.title: Make recommendation
step.action: Make go/no-go recommendation with rationale. If go, outline next steps. If no-go, explain why and suggest alternatives.

step.title: Produce spike report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with spike findings and recommendation.
